machine learning

  • 时间序列分析示例1

时间序列分析示例1¶

1. Daily Female Births Dataset¶

Daily Female Births Dataset

2. 读取数据¶

  • pandas.read.csv API

import pandas as pd

series = pd.read_csv("daily-total-female-births.csv",
                     header = 0,
                     parse_dates = [0],
                     index_col = 0,
                     squeeze = True)
print(type(series))
print(series.head())

<class 'pandas.core.series.Series'>
Date
1959-01-01    35
1959-01-02    32
1959-01-03    30
1959-01-04    31
1959-01-05    44
Name: Births, dtype: int64

3. 探索数据¶

print(series.head(10))

Date
1959-01-01    35
1959-01-02    32
1959-01-03    30
1959-01-04    31
1959-01-05    44
1959-01-06    29
1959-01-07    45
1959-01-08    43
1959-01-09    38
1959-01-10    27
Name: Births, dtype: int64

print(series.size)

365

print(series["1959-01"])

Date
1959-01-01    35
1959-01-02    32
1959-01-03    30
1959-01-04    31
1959-01-05    44
1959-01-06    29
1959-01-07    45
1959-01-08    43
1959-01-09    38
1959-01-10    27
1959-01-11    38
1959-01-12    33
1959-01-13    55
1959-01-14    47
1959-01-15    45
1959-01-16    37
1959-01-17    50
1959-01-18    43
1959-01-19    41
1959-01-20    52
1959-01-21    34
1959-01-22    53
1959-01-23    39
1959-01-24    32
1959-01-25    37
1959-01-26    43
1959-01-27    39
1959-01-28    35
1959-01-29    44
1959-01-30    38
1959-01-31    24
Name: Births, dtype: int64

print(series.describe())

count    365.000000
mean      41.980822
std        7.348257
min       23.000000
25%       37.000000
50%       42.000000
75%       46.000000
max       73.000000
Name: Births, dtype: float64

plt.plot(series)
plt.show()
